title: RSS Read node returns 403 status code in test workflow
symptom: When running the test workflow, the RSS Read node fails with a 403 status code, while it works fine when tested individually.
not_this_if: RSS Read node works in isolation
No authentication required for RSS feeds
root_cause: The 403 status code indicates that access to one of the RSS feeds is forbidden, possibly due to authentication requirements or restrictions on the feed itself. This can happen when the workflow attempts to access feeds that require specific headers or credentials that are not provided in the test workflow context.
fix_steps: Identify the specific RSS feed causing the 403 error (e.g., politico.com)
Check if the feed requires authentication or specific headers
Consider using an HTTP request node to include necessary headers like User-Agent
Update the workflow accordingly and test again
agent_instruction: Identify the problematic RSS feed and switch to using an HTTP request node with appropriate headers.
